zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Betteshorne於大約1320年出生時，他的父親Roger de Betteshorne27歲，母親Margaret of Mere22歲。他於1352年與Lady Elizabeth De Gournali在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾貝福斯東結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他於1390年被列為member of parliament for hampshire。他去世於1399年2月6日在英國格盧斯特斯爾特波利享年80歲，埋葬在英國維爾爾梅。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Betteshorne于大约1320年出生时，他的父亲Roger de Betteshorne27岁，母亲Margaret of Mere22岁。他于1352年与Lady Elizabeth De Gournali在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾貝福斯東结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他于1390年被列为member of parliament for hampshire。他去世于1399年2月6日在英国格盧斯特斯爾特波利享年80岁，埋葬在英国維爾爾梅。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Betteshorne was born about 1320, his father, Roger de Betteshorne, was 27 and his mother, Margaret of Mere, was 22. He married Lady Elizabeth De Gournali in 1352, in Beverston, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. In 1390, at the age of 71, his occupation is listed as member of parliament for hampshire. He died on 6 February 1399, in Tetbury, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 80, and was buried in Mere, Wiltshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Betteshorne est né environ 1320, son père, Roger de Betteshorne, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Margaret of Mere, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Lady Elizabeth De Gournali en 1352, à Beverston, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. En 1390, à l’âge de 71 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est member of parliament for hampshire. Il est décédé le 6 février 1399, à Tetbury, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterré à Mere, Wiltshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Betteshorne um 1320 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger de Betteshorne 27 und seine Mutter Margaret of Mere 22. Er hat 1352 in Beverston, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom Lady Elizabeth De Gournali geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. 1390, als er 71 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als member of parliament for hampshire aufgeführt. Er starb am 6. Februar 1399 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Tetbury, Gloucestershire, England und wurde in Mere, Wiltshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Betteshorne è nato il circa 1320, il suo padre, Roger de Betteshorne, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Margaret of Mere, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Lady Elizabeth De Gournali nel 1352, nel Beverston, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Nel 1390, all'età di 71 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come member of parliament for hampshire. Morì il 6 febbraio 1399, nel Tetbury, Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 80 anni, e fu sepolto a Mere, Wiltshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Betteshorneが約1320年に生まれた時，父Roger de Betteshorneは27歳，母Margaret of Mereは22歳であった。1352年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアベバーストンでLady Elizabeth De Gournaliと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。1390年，71歳の時，職業はmember of parliament for hampshireと記録されている。彼は1399年2月6日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアテトブリーで80歳で死去し，イギリスウィルトシュアイアメアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Betteshorne(이)가 대략 1320년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger de Betteshorne(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret of Mere(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1352년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 비버스턴에서 Lady Elizabeth De Gournali(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1390년, 71세의 나이로 그의 직업은 member of parliament for hampshire이었다. 그는 1399년 2월 6일 영국 그루스스터실르 테트버이에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 윌츠히르 머에 묻혔다.

mn.Coberley, Gloucestershire, England, Unit: Coberley, Glevum, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Betteshorne nasceu aproximadamente 1320, seu pai, Roger de Betteshorne, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Margaret of Mere, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Elizabeth De Gournali em 1352, em Beverston, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Em 1390, com 71 anos, sua profissão aparece como member of parliament for hampshire. Ele faleceu em 6 de fevereiro de 1399, em Tetbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 80 anos, e foi sepultado em Mere, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Betteshorne родился около 1320 г., его отцу по имени Roger de Betteshorne было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret of Mere, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Elizabeth De Gournali в 1352 г. в местности бивирстон, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. В 1390 году, в возрасте 71 год,  он работал по профессии member of parliament for hampshire. Он умер 6 февраля 1399 г. в местности тетбури, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 80 лет и был похоронен в местности мир, уилцхир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Betteshorne nació aproximadamente 1320, su papá, Roger de Betteshorne, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Margaret of Mere, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Lady Elizabeth De Gournali en 1352, en Beverston, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. En 1390, a la edad de 71 años, su ocupación registrada era member of parliament for hampshire. Murió el 6 de febrero de 1399, en Tetbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 80 años, y fue sepultado en Mere, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.
